svg.text: Every operator you used today, grouped by what it does · chip color = the act in the guide where you'll find the example

g.text: Tip: filter as early as possible in your pipeline.
Smaller row sets make every later operator faster.
Stitch tables on a shared key
Tip: union when shapes match. Join when you need
pick or reshape what you keep
Keep first N rows after sorting
Tip: let blocks aren't just for reuse — they make
long queries readable by naming the parts.
Chip color legend — each act has its own color (cool/neutral → warm cloud → cool endpoint → hot identity → cool alerts)
A typical query reaches into multiple families
Shape the columns. Aggregate. Join. Sort last.

svg.text: Family panel color = what the operator does · chip color = which act in the guide demonstrates it
